entities.name: HELIOTHIS ARMIGERA
entities.description: A major pest insect with a wide geographical distribution causing significant crop losses.

entities.name: HELIOTHIS ZEA
entities.description: A major pest insect contributing to agricultural crop losses.

entities.name: HELIOTHIS VIRESCENS
entities.description: A major pest insect contributing to agricultural crop losses.

entities.name: HELIOTHIS SPP
entities.description: The collective species of the Heliothis genus that act as agricultural pests.

entities.name: CROP LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in agricultural productivity and yield caused by pest damage.

entities.name: NATURAL ENEMIES
entities.description: Biological organisms that naturally prey upon or parasitize pest insects.

entities.name: PESTICIDE USE
entities.description: The application of chemical pesticides for pest control, which can impact non-target organisms.

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERNS
entities.description: The spatial and temporal arrangement of crops in agricultural systems.

entities.name: MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The overall approach to agricultural and pest control practices.

entities.name: TRADITIONAL AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices that do not rely on modern chemical pesticides.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing new crop varieties, which may inadvertently increase susceptibility to pests.

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBLE CROPS
entities.description: Crop varieties that are more prone to damage by pests like Heliothis spp.
